branch.branch_summary: Run a runtime-backed v8.8 direction review and open the first External Runtime Reproduction and Rollback Proof implementation task.

tree_answer.where_are_we: The runtime is between v8.7 and the next concrete branch.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Prepare v8.8 External Runtime Reproduction and Rollback Proof: prove that an approved external runtime action can be reconstructed, replayed, and rollback-checked from canonical evidence before any production execution claim is trusted.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Run a runtime-backed direction review before opening the next implementation task: Run a runtime-backed v8.8 direction review and open the first External Runtime Reproduction and Rollback Proof implementation task.
